def positive_timezone_naive_datetime_accepted_in_public_contract():
    rule_id = "timezone_naive_datetime_accepted_in_public_contract"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag public contracts that accept datetimes with ambiguous timezone semantics."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
